heading: Conditions on furnishing assistance
label: 2272 Conditions on furnishing assistance
text: The President shall ensure that assistance authorized by this chapter and the Arms Export Control Act [ et seq.] to Central American countries is furnished in a manner which fosters demonstrated progress toward and commitment to the objectives set forth in . Where necessary to achieve this purpose, the President shall impose conditions on the furnishing of such assistance. In carrying out this section, the President shall consult with the Congress in regard to progress toward the objectives set forth in , and any conditions imposed on the furnishing of assistance in furtherance of those objectives.22 U.S.C. 2751section 2271 of this titlesection 2271 of this title
